svg.text: Private Azure AI Foundry Agent Architecture — Customer Network Integration

g.text: Secure connectivity for all Azure services — No public internet exposure
On-prem users connect via VPN S2S or ExpressRoute — no public internet path
Traffic enters Azure VNet via private connectivity; DNS resolves to private endpoints
AI Foundry Project hosts the Agent with tools & knowledge
Agent accesses Cosmos DB, AI Search & Storage via Private Endpoints
